notes:
v1.3.1 — Bug Fixes
🐛 Bug Fixes:
• MATT Flow Control: Monk's Active Tile Triggers action now waits for puzzle completion and resumes with the result. Supports success/failure anchor branching.
• MATT Failure Hook: Tiles with linked items now correctly fire the revealed hook on puzzle failure.
• MATT Re-trigger: Already-solved tiles no longer re-open when triggered through MATT.

announcement.title: 🎁 Unboxing the Mystery v1.3.1
announcement.content:
v1.3.1 — MATT Integration Fixes

  • 🔗 Flow Control: Trigger Puzzle action now pauses the workflow until the puzzle is resolved. Supports optional success/failure anchor tags for conditional branching.
  • 🔗 Failure Hook: Puzzle failure on tiles with linked items now correctly notifies MATT.
  • 🔗 Re-trigger: Already-solved tiles no longer re-open through MATT.
